name: Apple Kuchen Wvhv17a
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine apples and 5 tablespoons of sugar; add cinnamon.
2. Sift flour, the remaining sugar, baking powder, and salt into a bowl.
3. Make a well in the center and pour oil, eggs, juice, and vanilla into it.
4. Beat with a spoon until blended.
5. Spoon one-third of the batter into a greased 9-inch angel food pan.
6. Arrange half of the apple mixture (drained) in a ring on top.
7. Spoon another third of the batter over the apples.
8. Spread the remaining apples and pour the last third of the batter on top.
9. Bake in a 375°F oven for 1 hour or until done. Test with a toothpick.
10. Serve warm or cold with whipped cream.
